title: Extended Tools
description: Extended Tools is a tool/armor addon for Forge mods
body:
Extended Tools is an addon for Forge Mods that adds tools for each type of ingot in the mod as well as some vanilla ones. **Join us on discord:** ![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/569969909380153345.svg?label=Join%20us%20on%20Discord&logo=discord&logoColor=FFFFFF&style=flat-square) [Click here](https://discord.gg/bzH7CdQWRb) You should also check out my new Patreon!    [![](https://img.shields.io/endpoint.svg?url=https://shieldsio-patreon.vercel.app/api?username=aurilisdev&type=patrons&style=for-the-badge)](https://www.patreon.com/aurilisdev) You should also check out our official modpack here: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/ampz-1-18
It is a recreation of voltz for minecraft 1.20 **![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/344/1/skjermbilde.PNG)** Tools ( paxel, pickaxe, axe, shovel, hoe, sword) & armors:  * Copper * Bronze * Tin * Steel * Lead * Vanadium * Silver * Paxel only -> Netherite * Paxel only -> Diamond * Paxel only -> Iron * Paxel only -> Gold * Paxel only -> Stone * Paxel only -> Wood **Donations** Donations are also highly appreciated. You will also gain the electrodynamics cape if you donate more than 5$! Just make sure that you send me a dm on either mail or on discord and i will enable it for you :) [Press this to donate](https://www.curseforge.com/linkout?remoteUrl=https://www.paypal.com/cgi-bin/webscr?return=https://www.curseforge.com/projects/316867&cn=Add special instructions to the addon author\(\)&business=aurilisdev@gmail.com&bn=PP-DonationsBF:btn_donateCC_LG.gif:NonHosted&cancel_return=https://www.curseforge.com/projects/316867&lc=US&item_name=Electrodynamics \(from curseforge.com\)&cmd=_donations&rm=1&no_shipping=1¤cy_code=USD) **Permission to use in modpacks:** Yes you are allowed to do this: However, as written in the license (special permissions referring to distribution):  ``` You may only use the special permissions above, if you provide proper attribution to the Owner of this software "Sebastian Siljuholtet Johansen" (in the form of credit) and an URL to this Software�s official download page were the pack is accessed. ```
